# Page Plans: {{PROJECT_NAME}}

> Section-by-section architecture with Creative Recipe Cards.
> Every section has 10 mandatory fields. `section-builder` implements exactly what's here.
> NO improvisation. NO blanks. NO TBD.

---

## Section Minimums (ENFORCED)

| Page Type | Min Sections | Required Purposes |
|-----------|-------------|-------------------|
| Homepage | 8 | Impact, Manifesto, 1+ Energy, Close |
| About/Studio | 6 | Impact, Context, Process/Team, Close |
| Services | 6 | Impact, Showcase per service, Close |
| Portfolio | 5 | Impact, Showcase grid, Close |
| Case Study | 6 | Impact, Context, Process, Evidence, Close |
| Contact | 3 | Impact, Form, Info |

---

Categories: Timeline, Scrub, Reveal, Stagger, Pin, Depth, Morphing, Typography, Cinematic

---

## Global — Header

- **Layout**: Sticky, transparent over hero, solid background on scroll
- **Content**: Logo + nav links + CTA button
- **Interaction**: Logo magnetic. Links have underline gradient reveal. Mobile: hamburger overlay.
- **Motion**: Intelligent visibility — hide on scroll-down, show on scroll-up
- **Responsive**: Mobile: hamburger with full-screen overlay

## Global — Footer

- **Purpose**: Destination (not afterthought)
- **Layout**: {{LAYOUT}}
- **Content**: Large CTA + columns (nav, contact, social, legal)
- **Interaction**: Links hover animation. CTA magnetic.
- **Motion**: Column stagger entrance
- **Responsive**: Mobile: single column stacked

## Validation

- [ ] All pages meet minimum section count
- [ ] ALL recipe card fields filled (no blanks, no TBD)
- [ ] Motion category map has no consecutive repeats
- [ ] 5+ unique categories used on homepage
- [ ] 1+ energy break per page with 6+ sections
- [ ] Hero is full-viewport with orchestrated entrance
- [ ] Close is cinematic (not paragraph + button)
- [ ] 3+ sections specify typography-as-design
- [ ] 2+ sections use asymmetric/unconventional layout
